Package org.eventb.core.tool

Interface IStateRepository<I extends IState>

All Known Subinterfaces:
IPOGStateRepository, ISCStateRepository
All Known Implementing Classes:
POGStateRepository, SCStateRepository, StateRepository
public interface IStateRepository<I extends IState>
The state repository allows different modules to share state. Modules can read and write shared state (IState) in the repository.

The repository has a strict protocol to deal with errors. As soon as an exception is thrown by some of the methods of a repository, the repository keeps throwing that exception. It does not recover.

A ITypeEnvironmentBuilder is contained in any state repository.

This interface is not intended to be implemented by clients.

Since:
1.1

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FormulaFactory
    getFormulaFactory()
    Returns the formula factory stored in the repository.
    <T extends I>

    Returns the state stored for the specified state type.

    Returns the type environment stored in the repository.

    Remove the state of the specified type from the repository.

    Sets the formula factory of this state repository.
    void

    Set the specified state.
    void
    setTypeEnvironment(ITypeEnvironmentBuilder environment)
    Sets the type environment of this state repository.

  • Method Details

    • getState

      <T extends I> T getState(IStateType<T> stateType) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns the state stored for the specified state type.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the Java type of the state
      Parameters:
      stateType - the type of the state
      Returns:
      the state stored for the specified state type
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if no state for the specified type has been set, (i.e. if the state was not initialised before being read), or if an exception has occurred earlier with this repository

    • setState

      void setState(I state) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Set the specified state. The state type is accessible by means of IState.
      Parameters:
      state - the state to set
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if the state equals null or if an exception has occurred earlier with this repository

    • removeState

      void removeState(IStateType<? extends I> stateType) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Remove the state of the specified type from the repository. It is not important if the repository contains a state of the specified type or not. If such a state is not contained, nothing happens.
      Parameters:
      stateType - the state type of the state to be removed
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if an exception has occurred earlier with this repository

    • getTypeEnvironment

      ITypeEnvironmentBuilder getTypeEnvironment() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns the type environment stored in the repository.
      Returns:
      the type environment stored in the repository
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if an exception has occurred earlier with this repository
      Since:
      3.0

    • setTypeEnvironment

      void setTypeEnvironment(ITypeEnvironmentBuilder environment) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Sets the type environment of this state repository.
      Parameters:
      environment - the type environment to set
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if the passed type environment is null or if an exception has occurred earlier with this repository
      Since:
      3.0

    • getFormulaFactory

      FormulaFactory getFormulaFactory() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns the formula factory stored in the repository.
      Returns:
      the formula factory stored in the repository
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if an exception has occurred earlier with this repository
      Since:
      2.0

    • setFormulaFactory

      void setFormulaFactory(FormulaFactory factory) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Sets the formula factory of this state repository.
      Parameters:
      factory - the formula factory to set
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if the passed formula factory is null or if an exception has occurred earlier with this repository
      Since:
      2.0
